# growthbook_archetype (Resource)

A GrowthBook archetype. Archetypes are reusable sets of user attributes used to evaluate and debug feature flags for representative users.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_archetype" "power_user" {
  name        = "Power user"
  description = "Representative attribute set for a power user"
  is_public   = true
  attributes  = jsonencode({ plan = "enterprise", country = "US", logins = 100 })
  projects    = [growthbook_project.web.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the archetype is available to other team members.
- `name` (String) Human-readable archetype name.

### Optional

- `attributes` (String) JSON-encoded object of attribute values to set when using this archetype.
- `description` (String) Optional description of the archetype.
- `environments` (List of String) Environments this archetype is limited to. Empty means all environments.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this archetype is scoped to. Empty means all projects.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `id` (String) Unique archetype identifier.
- `owner` (String) User ID of the archetype owner (or legacy owner name/email).
- `owner_email` (String) Resolved email of the archetype owner, when available.
